headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Buying Welltower (WELL) After Its 5 Year Surge?
summary: Wondering if Welltower at US$206.34 is priced for perfection or still leaves room on the table? This article walks through what the current share price could be telling you about value. The stock has returned 2.0% over the last 7 days and 10.4% year to date, with a small 0.7% decline over the last 30 days, while the 1 year and 5 year returns sit at 47.9% and 207.6% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on Welltower's role as a major health care REIT, with attention on portfolio...
